name: AI methods section — sensitivity baseline

input.generatePrompt: Write the methods section of a randomised controlled trial comparing two antihypertensive drugs in elderly patients. Include study design, inclusion/exclusion criteria, randomisation, blinding, primary and secondary endpoints, and statistical analysis plan. Write approximately 300 words in formal academic style.

qualityCriteria: AI-generated methods section scores ≤30% human probability
At least 2 paragraphs flagged as AI
Methods text is especially formulaic — detector should still flag it
